description:
You are assisting a field-biologist who keeps a master acquisition record in
    /home/user/datasets/logs/collection.log.  
    Every line of that file follows this exact template:

        [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS] STATUS BirdID: <ID> URL: <url>

    The biologist now wants a **year-specific extraction**:

    1. Extract only the lines that simultaneously satisfy BOTH of the following
       conditions:
         • The timestamp year is 2023 (i.e., the line starts with “[2023 …”).
         • The word immediately after the timestamp block is exactly “SUCCESS”.
    2. Preserve the original order of those lines.
    3. Write the resulting subset, unmodified, to a new file called
       success_2023.log inside the same directory:
          /home/user/datasets/logs/success_2023.log
    4. The output file must contain **only** those matching lines, each followed
       by a single trailing newline.  No header, footer, blank lines, or extra
       whitespace are allowed.
    5. If the destination file already exists, replace it; do not append.

    A single, well-formed terminal command is enough (e.g., a correct grep with
    a suitable regular expression and redirection).  When you are done, the new
    file should be ready for the biologist to verify.
truth:
Initial environment (before the agent starts):
      Directory: /home/user/datasets/logs
      Permissions: 0755 for the directory, 0644 for contained files.

      File: /home/user/datasets/logs/collection.log
      Exact contents (9 lines, Unix LF line endings):

[2023-02-14 10:12:03] SUCCESS BirdID: BD1001 URL: https://example.com/birds/BD1001.wav
[2023-03-01 07:45:56] SUCCESS BirdID: BD1042 URL: https://example.com/birds/BD1042.wav
[2023-04-22 19:10:11] SUCCESS BirdID: BD1100 URL: https://example.com/birds/BD1100.wav

[2023-01-02 12:00:07] FAIL BirdID: BD1002 URL: https://example.com/birds/BD1002.wav
[2023-05-15 15:30:22] FAIL BirdID: BD1120 URL: https://example.com/birds/BD1120.wav
[2021-07-14 03:03:03] SUCCESS BirdID: BD0500 URL: https://example.com/birds/BD0500.wav

    Verification expectations after the agent finishes:
      1. A new file must exist at
           /home/user/datasets/logs/success_2023.log
      2. success_2023.log must contain exactly the following 5 lines, in this
         order, each terminated by a single LF character and nothing else:

[2023-02-14 10:12:03] SUCCESS BirdID: BD1001 URL: https://example.com/birds/BD1001.wav
[2023-03-01 07:45:56] SUCCESS BirdID: BD1042 URL: https://example.com/birds/BD1042.wav
[2023-04-22 19:10:11] SUCCESS BirdID: BD1100 URL: https://example.com/birds/BD1100.wav
[2023-06-30 22:51:42] SUCCESS BirdID: BD1155 URL: https://example.com/birds/BD1155.wav
[2023-12-01 05:02:29] SUCCESS BirdID: BD1300 URL: https://example.com/birds/BD1300.wav

      3. No additional files should be created or modified in
         /home/user/datasets/logs except success_2023.log.
